title: Release bee 0.1.42
action: Bump BEE_VERSION and both plugin manifests to 0.1.42, self-onboard beegog so .bee/bin + onboarding.json match, sync the global skill root (it is currently STALE vs skills/ source), tag v0.1.42 and push. Release note must carry, plainly: (1) the codex advisor command was malformed and never worked — workspace-write sat in the PROMPT positional, -s was missing, --yolo meant no sandbox ever ran; (2) --dangerously-skip-permissions is REMOVED from the shipped generation preset (measured surplus, not required); (3) advisor is now read-only, a behavior change — an advisor that could write no longer can; (4) this release is UNREVIEWED: 11 candidates, 1 hard-gate, owner explicitly declined a review session before shipping.

truths: Self-onboard leaves .bee/bin and onboarding.json consistent with source
The global skill root is no longer stale vs skills/
The release note states the unreviewed status honestly
prohibitions: Do NOT label anything reviewed — the owner declined review

verify: grep -q "BEE_VERSION = '0.1.42'" .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/state.mjs && grep -q '"version": "0.1.42"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json .codex-plugin/plugin.json && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs >/dev/null && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs >/dev/null && echo RELEASE_OK

trace.verify_output:
RELEASE_OK
FULL VERIFY exit=0 (test_lib, test_onboard_bee, test_portable_paths, test_model_guard, test_write_guard, test_hook_contracts)
onboard --json -> status: up_to_date, plan: []
global skill root: bee-hive IN SYNC, bee-swarming IN SYNC (was stale)
version 0.1.42 at all four sites
UNREVIEWED: 11 candidates, 1 high-risk. Owner explicitly declined a review session before shipping.
trace.verify_command: version grep x4 && test_lib && test_onboard_bee; plus the full verify chain and an onboarding recheck
